AFFECT [[17477757197668945522]]
    TRAVERSE [[7711468349764991]] > [[6502786168]]:[[477062473974076915]]
        REMOVE [[8545339034058226003]][.[[8399878573055752961]]=[["15264041274426464048]]]
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
AFFECT [[8850026134298937527]]
    IMPORT net.asivery.AppLoad [[180922.180921]]
    IMPORT [[6504469795.6504031891.7713050416939675]] [[180922.180921]]
    TRAVERSE [[8397993708429497603]]
        LOCATE BEFORE [[7081645463424]]#[[16535813298890332374]]
        INSERT {
            property ~&214620122227&~ appLoadView: _appLoadView
            required property ~&197102514&~ apploadVKB
            required property ~&197102514&~ apploadWindowParent
        }

        LOCATE AFTER [[7081645463424]]#[[16535813298890332374]]
        INSERT {
            ~&7081645463424&~ {
                ~&5972374&~: _appLoadView
                ~&233721384511543&~.~&6503816592&~: ~&7083038346995&~
                ~&233748328658231&~: ~&214625660372&~
                ~&7082453764421&~: ~&6504329801&~
                ~&7083172477658&~: "qrc:/appload/qml/appload.qml"

                ~&7713401454751279&~: {
                    _appLoadView.~&6503936152&~.absoluteRoot = apploadWindowParent;
                    _appLoadView.item.virtualKeyboardRef = apploadVKB;
                }
            }

            ~&428051690305612204&~ {
                ~&7083194890448&~: _appLoadView.~&6503936152&~

                function onRequestClose() {
                    _appLoadView.~&233748328658231&~ = ~&214625660372&~;
                }
            }
        }
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT

AFFECT [[2328484894988065446]]
    TRAVERSE [[8397788359424131273]]
        TRAVERSE ?#[[254540341572282132]]
            LOCATE BEFORE ALL
            INSERT {
                apploadVKB: _apploadVirtualKeyboard
                apploadWindowParent: windowParent
            }
        END TRAVERSE
        LOCATE BEFORE [[7081372714662.10578197394989910333]]
        INSERT {
            Item {
                id: windowParent
                anchors.fill: parent
            }
            Loader {
                id: _apploadVirtualKeyboard

                property var layout: null
                property var config: null
                width: parent.width
                anchors.bottom: parent.bottom
                anchors.horizontalCenter: parent.horizontalCenter
                active: false
                visible: active
                source: "qrc:/appload/qml/virtualKeyboard/Keyboard.qml"

                onLoaded: () => {
                    console.log("Rebuild keyboard data: ", _apploadVirtualKeyboard.layout, _apploadVirtualKeyboard.config);
                    _apploadVirtualKeyboard.item.rebuildKeyboard(_apploadVirtualKeyboard.layout, _apploadVirtualKeyboard.config);
                }
            }
        }
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT

AFFECT [[4911547370760691430]]
    TRAVERSE [[3819512207256720568]] > [[14125623155555875541]]#[[15885405667098360701]]
        LOCATE AFTER [[3819512207256720568]]#[[4073320026945606142]]
        INSERT {
            ~&16385778650434842232&~ {
                ~&5972374&~: openAppLoad
                ~&8399878573055752961&~: "openAppLoad"
                ~&214642559243&~: ~&6504222003&~("AppLoad")
                ~&8399601734642709923&~: "qrc:/appload/icons/appload"
                ~&7082453764421&~: ~&214625660372&~
                ~&233726547792244&~: ~&6504329801&~
                ~&254542236275632405&~: {
                    ~&7712792149454042&~();
                    ~&6504254477&~.~&6500896584423236548&~();
                }
                ~&7081629735527&~.~&17520348323745447649&~: ~&7082020628281&~.~&15061686673205541622&~
                ~&7081629735527&~.~&7797818826744279624&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&214646099849&~
                ~&11921478716705041271&~: ~&6504254477&~

                function ~&7712792149454042&~() {
                    ~&7083211098251&~();
                    ~&254540341572282132&~.appLoadView.~&233748328658231&~ = ~&6504329801&~;
                }
            }
        }
    END TRAVERSE
    TRAVERSE [[3819512207256720568]]#[[6504254477]]
        REBUILD [[15578034235503008618]]
            LOCATE AFTER STREAM \~&16045040163728568448&~\ INSERT STREAM \, openAppLoad\
        END REBUILD
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT


; Reach within the appload files themselves:
AFFECT /appload/qml/window.qml
    IMPORT [[6504469795.6504031891.7713050416939675]] [[180922.180921]]
    IMPORT [[6504469795.6504031891.15778643682317564345]] [[180922.180921]]
    IMPORT [[7082546018834]] [[180922.180921]]
    TRAVERSE [[8397993708429497603]]
        TRAVERSE [[254501108490678590]]#mainWindowView
            REPLACE [[254494525842443467]]#qmldiffEventBlocker WITH {
                ~&254494525842443467&~ {
                    ~&233721384511543&~.~&6503816592&~: ~&7083038346995&~
                }
                ~&254504370080162629&~ {
                    ~&233721384511543&~.~&6503816592&~: ~&7083038346995&~
                    ~&8545339034058226003&~ {
                        ~&8399878573055752961&~: "close-appload-application"
                        ~&254526613107157226&~: ~&5971598&~.~&214638019283&~(0, 1)
                        ~&6503646466&~: ~&5971598&~.~&6504243191&~(0, 0, ~&7083038346995&~.~&214646099849&~, ~&7082020628281&~.~&496707965879903317&~)
                        ~&233726547792244&~: !coord.disableGestures
                        ~&495358363329399331&~: swipeFromTheTop()
                    }
                }
            }
        END TRAVERSE
        REMOVE [[7081261925573]]#qmldiffReplaceMeButton
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT

AFFECT /appload/qml/window.qml
    IMPORT [[6504469795.6504031891.482865292219586403]] [[180922.180921]]
    IMPORT [[6504469795.6504031891.7082625047238]] [[180922.180921]] [[7081372714662]]
    TRAVERSE [[8397993708429497603]] > [[254501108490678590]] > FBController
        LOCATE BEFORE ALL
        INSERT {
            ~&7081372714662&~.~&10578197394989910333&~ {
                ~&233721384511543&~.~&6503816592&~: ~&7083038346995&~
                ~&233748328658231&~: !~&6504254477&~.minimized && windowCanvas.~&7082453764421&~
                ~&8399878573055752961&~: "appload-window"
                ~&6504074414&~: [
                    ~&7081372714662&~.~&10578197394989910333&~.~&197061260&~,
                    ~&7081372714662&~.~&10578197394989910333&~.~&6502924770&~,
                    ~&7081372714662&~.~&10578197394989910333&~.~&254477590585233257&~,
                    ~&7081372714662&~.~&10578197394989910333&~.~&233682693073220&~,
                    ~&7081372714662&~.~&10578197394989910333&~.~&5971687&~,
                ][windowCanvas.refreshMode]
            }

            onRequestFullRefresh: () => {
                ~&482865290967253827&~.~&8021204117616398611&~(~&"2385305732936506181&~);
            }
        }
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT

AFFECT /qt/qml/net/asivery/ApploadUtils/DisplayMethodArea.qml
    IMPORT [[6504469795.6504031891.7082625047238]] [[180922.180921]] [[7081372714662]]
    REDEFINE [[6502786168]]
        LOCATE BEFORE ALL
        REPLACE { ~&6502786168&~ } WITH { ~&7081372714662&~.~&10578197394989910333&~ }
    END REDEFINE

    LOCATE BEFORE ALL
    TRAVERSE [[7081372714662.10578197394989910333]]
        LOCATE AFTER ALL
        INSERT {
            ~&6504074414&~: [
                ~&7081372714662&~.~&10578197394989910333&~.~&197061260&~,
                ~&7081372714662&~.~&10578197394989910333&~.~&6502924770&~,
                ~&7081372714662&~.~&10578197394989910333&~.~&254477590585233257&~,
                ~&7081372714662&~.~&10578197394989910333&~.~&5971687&~,
                ~&7081372714662&~.~&10578197394989910333&~.~&233682693073220&~
            ][displayMethod]
        }
        REMOVE onDisplayMethodChanged
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
